title: austroblechnum keysseri
intro: Austroblechnum keysseri, also known as Keysser's water fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Austroblechnum keysseri include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it in smoking blends to aid in respiratory relief.
